title: Annotate ggplot2 Visualisation
text: goal ggscribe annotate ‘ggplot2’ visualisation using set theme. includes functions annotate components set theme, functions annotate use set theme defaults.

title: Annotate ggplot2 Visualisation
text: can install development version ggscribe GitHub :

title: ggscribe: Annotate 'ggplot2' Visualisation — ggscribe-package
text: Annotate 'ggplot2' visualisation using set theme. includes functions annotate components set theme, functions annotate use set theme defaults.

title: ggscribe: Annotate 'ggplot2' Visualisation — ggscribe-package
text: Maintainer: First Last first.last@example.com

title: Annotate axis line segment — scribe_axis_line
text: Create annotated segment axis line. function designed work theme globally set. used coord ggplot2::coord_cartesian(clip = ""). Note function support plots either positional scale date datetime class. Use ggplot2::geom_segment, ggplot2::geom_hline ggplot2::geom_vline instead.

title: Annotate axis line segment — scribe_axis_line
code: scribe_axis_line(   ...,   position = NULL,   x = NULL,   y = NULL,   xmin = NULL,   xmax = NULL,   ymin = NULL,   ymax = NULL,   colour = NULL,   linewidth = NULL,   linetype = NULL,   theme = "keep" )

title: Annotate axis line segment — scribe_axis_line
text: ... Arguments passed ggplot2::annotate("segment", ....) (normalised coordinates used). Require named arguments (support trailing commas). position position axis line. One "top", "bottom", "left", "right". Ignored x y provided. x single x-axis value vertical line. used together y xmin/xmax. Use () normalized coordinates (0-1). y single y-axis value horizontal line. used together x ymin/ymax. Use () normalized coordinates (0-1). xmin starting x position horizontal line segment. Use () normalized coordinates (0-1). xmax ending x position horizontal line segment. Use () normalized coordinates (0-1). ymin starting y position vertical line segment. Use () normalized coordinates (0-1). ymax ending y position vertical line segment. Use () normalized coordinates (0-1). colour colour annotated segment. Inherits current theme axis.line etc. linewidth number. Inherits current theme axis.line etc. linetype integer. Inherits current theme axis.line etc. theme modify corresponding theme element. One "keep", "transparent", "blank". Defaults "keep".

title: Annotate axis line segment — scribe_axis_line
text: list annotation annotates theme elements.

title: Annotate axis text — scribe_axis_text
text: Create annotated text labels axis breaks. function designed work theme globally set. used coord ggplot2::coord_cartesian(clip = "").

title: Annotate axis text — scribe_axis_text
code: scribe_axis_text(   ...,   position = NULL,   x = NULL,   y = NULL,   label = NULL,   colour = NULL,   size = NULL,   family = NULL,   length = NULL,   hjust = NULL,   vjust = NULL,   angle = 0,   theme = "keep" )

title: Annotate axis text — scribe_axis_text
text: ... Require named arguments (support trailing commas). position position axis text. One "top", "bottom", "left", "right". Ignored x y provided. x vector x-axis breaks text positioning. Use () specify normalized coordinates (0-1). y vector y-axis breaks text positioning. Use () specify normalized coordinates (0-1). label vector text labels function takes breaks returns labels. NULL, uses appropriate formatting based data type. colour colour text. Inherits current theme axis.text etc. size size text. Inherits current theme axis.text etc. family font family text. Inherits current theme axis.text etc. length tick length grid unit. Use rel() scale relative default length. Negative values rel() negative multiplier place text opposite side axis (inside panel). Inherits current theme axis.ticks.length etc. hjust, vjust Horizontal vertical justification. Auto-calculated based position NULL. length negative, justification automatically adjusts flipped position. angle Text rotation angle. Defaults 0. theme equivalent theme elements. Either "keep", "transparent", "blank". Defaults "keep".

title: Annotate axis text — scribe_axis_text
text: list annotation annotates theme elements.

title: Annotate axis ticks segments — scribe_axis_ticks
text: Create annotated segments axis ticks. function designed work theme globally set. used coord ggplot2::coord_cartesian(clip = "").

title: Annotate axis ticks segments — scribe_axis_ticks
code: scribe_axis_ticks(   ...,   position = NULL,   x = NULL,   y = NULL,   minor = FALSE,   colour = NULL,   linewidth = NULL,   length = NULL,   theme = "keep" )

title: Annotate axis ticks segments — scribe_axis_ticks
text: ... Require named arguments (support trailing commas). position position axis ticks. One "top", "bottom", "left", "right". x vector x-axis breaks ticks positioning. Use () specify normalized coordinates (0-1). y vector y-axis breaks ticks positioning. Use () specify normalized coordinates (0-1). minor TRUE FALSE whether relate minor ticks. Defaults FALSE. colour colour ticks. Inherits current theme axis.ticks etc. linewidth linewidth ticks. Inherits current theme axis.ticks etc. length total distance axis line ticks grid unit. Use rel() scale relative default length. Negative values rel() negative multiplier flip direction. theme equivalent theme elements. Either "keep", "transparent", "blank". Defaults "keep".

title: Annotate axis ticks segments — scribe_axis_ticks
text: list annotation annotates theme elements.

title: Annotate curve — scribe_curve
text: Create annotated curved line segments defaults axis line set theme.

title: Annotate curve — scribe_curve
code: scribe_curve(   ...,   x = NULL,   y = NULL,   xend = NULL,   yend = NULL,   curvature = 0.5,   angle = 90,   ncp = 5,   colour = NULL,   linewidth = NULL,   linetype = NULL )

title: Annotate curve — scribe_curve
text: ... Arguments passed ggplot2::annotate("curve", ....). Require named arguments (support trailing commas). x, y, xend, yend Start end positions curve. Use () normalized coordinates (0-1). curvature numeric value giving amount curvature. Defaults 0.5. angle numeric value 0 180, giving amount skew control points curve. Defaults 90. ncp number control points used draw curve. Defaults 5. colour colour curve. Inherits current theme axis.line etc. linewidth linewidth curve. Inherits current theme axis.line etc. linetype linetype curve. Inherits current theme axis.line etc.

title: Annotate curve — scribe_curve
text: list containing annotation layers.

title: Annotate panel grid segments — scribe_panel_grid
text: Create annotated segments panel grid. function designed work theme globally set.

title: Annotate panel grid segments — scribe_panel_grid
code: scribe_panel_grid(   ...,   x = NULL,   y = NULL,   xmin = NULL,   xmax = NULL,   ymin = NULL,   ymax = NULL,   minor = FALSE,   colour = NULL,   linewidth = NULL,   linetype = NULL,   theme = "keep" )

title: Annotate panel grid segments — scribe_panel_grid
text: ... Arguments passed ggplot2::annotate("segment", ....) (normalised coordinates used). Require named arguments (support trailing commas). x vector x-axis breaks vertical grid lines. used together y. Use () specify normalized coordinates (0-1). y vector y-axis breaks horizontal grid lines. used together x. Use () specify normalized coordinates (0-1). xmin, xmax starting ending x positions horizontal grid lines. Use () normalized coordinates (0-1). Defaults -Inf Inf. ymin, ymax starting ending y positions vertical grid lines. Use () normalized coordinates (0-1). Defaults -Inf Inf. minor Logical. FALSE (default), creates major grid lines. TRUE, creates minor grid lines. colour colour grid lines. Inherits current theme panel.grid.major panel.grid.minor etc. linewidth number. Inherits current theme panel.grid.major panel.grid.minor etc. linetype integer. Inherits current theme panel.grid.major panel.grid.minor etc. theme equivalent theme elements. Either "keep", "transparent", "blank". Defaults "keep".

title: Annotate panel grid segments — scribe_panel_grid
text: list annotate annotates theme elements.

title: Annotate the panel background — scribe_panel_shade
text: Annotate filled rectangle panel background. designed work theme globally set.

title: Annotate the panel background — scribe_panel_shade
code: scribe_panel_shade(   ...,   xmin = -Inf,   xmax = Inf,   ymin = -Inf,   ymax = Inf,   fill = NULL,   alpha = 0.25,   colour = "transparent",   linewidth = NULL,   linetype = NULL )

title: Annotate the panel background — scribe_panel_shade
text: ... Arguments passed ggplot2::annotate("rect", ....) (normalised coordinates used). Require named arguments (support trailing commas). xmin value length 1. Defaults -Inf. Use () specify normalized coordinates (0-1). xmax value length 1. Defaults Inf. Use () specify normalized coordinates (0-1). ymin value length 1. Defaults -Inf. Use () specify normalized coordinates (0-1). ymax value length 1. Defaults Inf. Use () specify normalized coordinates (0-1). fill fill color blend panel background. Defaults "#8991A1FF". final rectangle color created blending fill current panel background: screen blend dark backgrounds, multiply blend light backgrounds. alpha transparency rectangle. Defaults 0.2 (subtle overlay). colour border colour rectangle. Defaults "transparent". linewidth number. Inherits current theme panel.border linewidth. Supports rel() relative sizing. linetype integer. Defaults 1.

title: Annotate the panel background — scribe_panel_shade
text: list containing annotation annotate.

title: Annotate segment — scribe_segment
text: Create annotated straight line segments defaults axis line set theme.

title: Annotate segment — scribe_segment
code: scribe_segment(   ...,   x = NULL,   y = NULL,   xend = NULL,   yend = NULL,   colour = NULL,   linewidth = NULL,   linetype = NULL )

title: Annotate segment — scribe_segment
text: ... Arguments passed ggplot2::annotate("segment", ....). Require named arguments (support trailing commas). x, y, xend, yend Start end positions segment. Use () normalized coordinates (0-1). colour colour segment. Inherits current theme axis.line etc. linewidth linewidth segment. Inherits current theme axis.line etc. linetype linetype segment. Inherits current theme axis.line etc.

title: Annotate segment — scribe_segment

title: Annotate text — scribe_text
text: Create annotated text labels defaults axis text set theme.

title: Annotate text — scribe_text
code: scribe_text(   ...,   x = NULL,   y = NULL,   label = NULL,   colour = NULL,   size = NULL,   family = NULL,   hjust = 0.5,   vjust = 0.5,   angle = 0 )

title: Annotate text — scribe_text
text: ... Arguments passed ggplot2::annotate("text", ....). Require named arguments (support trailing commas). x, y Position text. Use () normalized coordinates (0-1). label text display. colour colour text. Inherits current theme axis.text etc. size size text. Inherits current theme axis.text etc. family font family text. Inherits current theme axis.text etc. hjust, vjust Horizontal vertical justification. Defaults 0.5. angle Text rotation angle. Defaults 0.

title: Annotate text — scribe_text
text: list containing annotation layers.
